metadata.archetype_justification: The application owns persistent state in SQLite/PostgreSQL databases, exposes CRUD operations on business entities (Series, Episodes, EpisodeFiles, DownloadClients), manages entity lifecycles with status fields, and handles user-specific configuration data.
metadata.context: TV-series PVR for usenet and BitTorrent users (*arr suite).

readiness_profile.deployment_gate: Resolve all blockers before any agent deployment — including pilots.

findings.title: No Machine Identity Authentication
findings.description: The application uses a single shared API key for all programmatic access. There is no support for service accounts, client credentials OAuth 2.0, mTLS, or any mechanism that attributes requests to distinct machine identities.
findings.gap: No machine identity authentication. Cannot distinguish which agent or service made a call.
findings.recommendation: Implement support for multiple API keys with distinct identity labels, or add OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow via an API gateway.

blocker_remediation.immediate: Implement support for multiple API keys with distinct identity labels, or add OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow via an API gateway.
blocker_remediation.target_state: Each agent identity has its own credential with principal attribution recorded in logs.

findings.title: No Scoped Permissions (Least Privilege)
findings.description: Binary access model — valid API key grants full access to all endpoints and all operations. No RBAC or scoped permissions.
findings.gap: No scoped permissions. An agent with the API key can read, write, and delete any resource.
findings.recommendation: Implement RBAC or scoped API key permissions that differentiate read vs write access per resource type.

compensating_controls: Deploy API gateway restricting agent traffic to specific HTTP methods/paths.
Network-level controls for read-only reverse proxy.

findings.title: No Action-Level Authorization
findings.description: No action-level authorization. Any authenticated principal can perform any operation.
findings.gap: Cannot restrict an agent to read records but not delete them within the same resource type.
findings.recommendation: Add action-level authorization attributes or ABAC/fine-grained RBAC model.

compensating_controls: API gateway with method-level routing rules.
Middleware inspecting custom header to restrict HTTP methods for agents.

findings.title: No Immutable Audit Logging
findings.description: Logs HTTP requests but does NOT log authenticated principal identity. No immutable or tamper-evident log storage.
findings.gap: No authenticated principal attribution in logs. No immutable log storage.
findings.recommendation: Add principal attribution to logging middleware. Configure immutable log storage via external aggregation.

ara_metadata.resolution_reasoning: Read-only agents do not execute write operations, but audit logging is still important for forensics.
compensating_controls: Forward logs to append-only external system.
Inject principal identity into structured log entries.

findings.title: No Agent Identity Suspension Mechanism
findings.description: Single API key. Cannot suspend individual agent identity without affecting all consumers.
findings.gap: Cannot isolate misbehaving agent without disrupting all consumers.
findings.recommendation: Implement multi-key support with per-key lifecycle management.

compensating_controls: API gateway with per-client keys that can be individually revoked.
IP-based allowlisting.

findings.title: No Circuit Breakers for External Dependencies
findings.description: Polly retry only. No circuit breaker patterns. External dependency calls have no circuit breaker protection.
findings.gap: No circuit breaker pattern. Agent requests could cascade failures through external dependencies.
findings.recommendation: Add Polly CircuitBreaker policies on external HTTP client calls.

compensating_controls: Add Polly CircuitBreaker policies.
API gateway with circuit breaker capabilities.

findings.title: No Inbound API Rate Limiting
findings.description: No inbound API rate limiting. RateLimitService only throttles outbound requests. API accepts unlimited inbound requests.
findings.gap: No inbound API-layer rate limiting.
findings.recommendation: Add inbound rate limiting middleware or gateway-level limits.

compensating_controls: API gateway or reverse proxy with rate limiting.
ASP.NET Core rate limiting middleware.

findings.title: Sensitive Credentials Exposed in API Responses
findings.description: HostConfigResource API endpoint returns API key, hashed password, proxy credentials, SSL cert password without JsonIgnore filtering.
findings.gap: Sensitive credentials returned in general API responses without filtering. No access control differentiation.
findings.recommendation: Add [JsonIgnore] to sensitive fields. Create separate privileged endpoints for credential access.

ara_metadata.conditional_resolution: Resolved to RISK-SAFETY: agent_scope=read-only AND sensitive fields returned in API responses (B1 fired as RISK-SAFETY).
ara_metadata.resolution_reasoning: DATA-Q1 B1 fired because agent-facing APIs return credentials unmasked in HostConfigResource. Read-only scope resolves to RISK-SAFETY.

b1.reasoning: HostConfigResource returns API key, password, proxy credentials without JsonIgnore. Read-only → RISK-SAFETY.

b2.reasoning: Single API key grants access to all endpoints including credentials — no differentiation.

compensating_controls: Add [JsonIgnore] to sensitive fields.
Create separate admin-only endpoint for credentials.

findings.title: Incomplete PII Redaction in Logs
findings.description: CleanseLogMessage scrubs API keys and passwords via regex but does not redact broader PII (IP addresses, file paths, user-submitted content).
findings.gap: Log sanitization covers credentials but not broader PII.
findings.recommendation: Extend sanitization to cover IP addresses and user-identifiable file paths.

compensating_controls: Extend CleanseLogMessage patterns.
Configure log forwarding to strip PII.

findings.title: OpenAPI Spec Exists but Lacks Contract Validation
findings.description: OpenAPI 3.0.1 specs exist for V3 and V5, auto-generated via Swashbuckle, maintained in CI. No contract testing validates accuracy.
findings.gap: No contract testing validates spec matches actual API behavior.
findings.recommendation: Add OpenAPI spec diffing and contract validation to CI.

compensating_controls: Use existing specs for tool generation.
Add OpenAPI diff to CI.

findings.title: No Retryable Indicator in Error Responses
findings.description: Centralized error pipeline with structured bodies (message, description, content). No retryable boolean or error category.
findings.gap: Agent must infer retryability from HTTP status codes alone.
findings.recommendation: Add retryable boolean or error category field.

compensating_controls: Document retriable status codes in tool definitions.
Add retryable header.

findings.title: No Secrets Management Integration
findings.description: Credentials stored in plaintext config.xml. Environment variable overrides supported. No Secrets Manager or Vault integration. HostConfigResource API returns credentials.
findings.gap: No secrets management. Credentials in plaintext.
findings.recommendation: Integrate secrets management. Remove credentials from API responses.

compensating_controls: Use environment variables for credential injection.
Integrate secrets management system.

findings.title: Most List Endpoints Lack Pagination
findings.description: Pagination exists on some endpoints (logs, exclusions) but most entity list endpoints return all results without pagination. No max page size validation.
findings.gap: Most list endpoints return unbounded results.
findings.recommendation: Add pagination to all list endpoints. Implement max page size validation.

compensating_controls: Agent tools use explicit filtering parameters.
Limit queries to specific entity IDs.

findings.title: No Formal System of Record Documentation
findings.description: Sonarr is SoR for monitoring state and download history. Defers to TVDB/TMDb for metadata. No formal documentation of ownership boundaries.
findings.gap: No documented data ownership boundaries.
findings.recommendation: Document data ownership in API documentation.

compensating_controls: Document which entities are authoritative vs derived in agent tools.
Treat monitoring state as authoritative.

findings.title: No Freshness Signaling in API Responses
findings.description: Entities include timestamps (added, lastInfoSync). UTC storage. No Cache-Control or freshness headers in responses.
findings.gap: No freshness signaling. Agents cannot determine if data is current or stale.
findings.recommendation: Add Cache-Control or X-Data-Age headers to API responses.

compensating_controls: Use lastInfoSync field values client-side.
Add Cache-Control headers.

findings.title: No Automated Breaking Change Detection
findings.description: API versioned (V3, V5). OpenAPI maintained. 233 FluentMigrator migrations. No breaking change detection in CI.
findings.gap: No automated breaking change detection.
findings.recommendation: Add OpenAPI spec comparison (oasdiff) to CI.

compensating_controls: Pin agent tools to specific API version.
Add OpenAPI diff to CI.

findings.title: No Distributed Tracing
findings.description: NLog with CLEF structured JSON. Process-local sequential request IDs. No OpenTelemetry, no X-Ray, no traceparent propagation.
findings.gap: No distributed tracing or globally unique correlation IDs.
findings.recommendation: Add OpenTelemetry instrumentation with trace ID propagation.

compensating_controls: Add OpenTelemetry SDK.
Replace sequential IDs with GUID-based correlation.

findings.title: No API Error Rate or Latency Alerting
findings.description: Internal health checks with 25+ notification channels. No infrastructure-level alerting on API error rates or latency.
findings.gap: No error rate or latency alerting on the API surface.
findings.recommendation: Add metrics collection and alerting thresholds.

compensating_controls: Deploy monitoring with 5xx/latency alerting.
Use health check webhooks as partial signal.

findings.title: No Infrastructure as Code
findings.description: No IaC in repository. Self-hosted application distributed as platform-specific packages.
findings.gap: No IaC for agent-facing infrastructure.
findings.recommendation: Define hosting infrastructure as code for agent integration scenarios.

compensating_controls: Create IaC for agent-facing deployment.
Use container orchestration with version-controlled manifests.

findings.title: No API Contract Testing in CI
findings.description: Comprehensive CI pipeline (multi-OS, PostgreSQL compatibility) but no API contract tests or breaking change detection.
findings.gap: No API contract testing in CI.
findings.recommendation: Add contract testing or OpenAPI schema diffing to CI.

compensating_controls: Add OpenAPI diff tooling.
Pin agent tools with manual review on spec changes.

findings.title: No Automated Rollback Capability
findings.description: Self-hosted release model. No blue/green, no canary, no automated rollback.
findings.gap: No automated rollback.
findings.recommendation: Use container-based deployment with rollback for agent integration.

compensating_controls: Container orchestration rollback.
Pin versions and validate before upgrading.

findings.title: No Encryption at Rest
findings.description: SQLite unencrypted. Config in plaintext. No KMS integration.
findings.gap: No encryption at rest.
findings.recommendation: Use encrypted volumes at infrastructure layer.

compensating_controls: Deploy on encrypted volumes.
Use PostgreSQL with encryption on RDS.
